description_long: This stereo sound system features a sleek, rectangular body with a glossy red metallic finish on its top, sides, and back. The front panel is black and houses four large circular input ports, likely for microphones or instruments, each surrounded by a metallic ring. Above these ports are several small, round control knobs and buttons, as well as a large volume dial on the right side. The front panel also includes a few indicator lights and smaller buttons, suggesting multiple input and control options. The overall design is modern and compact, with smooth, rounded edges and a minimalist aesthetic. The back and sides are unadorned, emphasizing the device's streamlined appearance.
description: A compact, glossy red stereo sound system with a black front panel featuring multiple input ports, control knobs, and a large volume dial. The design is modern, with smooth edges and a minimalist look.
description_view_0: The front view shows the black control panel with four large input ports, several knobs and buttons, a large volume dial, and indicator lights.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a smooth, uninterrupted red metallic surface with no visible features or controls.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a plain red metallic back with no visible ports, controls, or markings.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a featureless, glossy red metallic surface.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel on the front features four large circular input ports in a horizontal row, each with a metallic ring, above which are several small round knobs and buttons. A large volume dial is positioned to the right, with additional small buttons and indicator lights nearby.
